prompt: Implement the synthesizable module accu in accu.sv. Ports: clk, active-low asynchronous rst_n, data_in[7:0], valid_in, valid_out, and data_out[9:0]. Accept data_in only on rising clock edges where valid_in is high. For every non-overlapping group of four accepted bytes, drive their 10-bit sum on data_out and pulse valid_out high for exactly one cycle. Invalid cycles must not advance the group. Reset clears partial state and valid_out.
instruction: Complete accu.sv with the four-sample valid-gated accumulator.
